name: @circuit-llm/agent
description: Circuit SDK agent runtime — write an autonomous agent (CircuitAgent) with pluggable custody (paper · self-custody · off-box signer · non-custodial vault). Buy/sell only; on the mesh the key stays off-box, so funds can't leave.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir dist && tsup bin/circuit-agent.ts --format esm --out-dir dist
scripts.prepack: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir dist && tsup bin/circuit-agent.ts --format esm --out-dir dist
